response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with over 12 years in the field, exceeding the required 6+ years. Her expertise spans multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Python, D, C++, etc.), frameworks (React, Nest.js, Ember.js), databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL), and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes). She has direct experience with AI agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) and strong testing expertise (TDD, Vitest, Jest). Her leadership in open-source projects and contributions to scalable systems further validate her fit for this role.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with 12+ years of experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Direct experience with AI agent development and modern tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong testing culture (TDD, CI/CD) and contributions to scalable, high-performance systems
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (primary stack requirement) in recent roles
Primary stack includes Dlang (not listed in secondary technologies), though TypeScript/Node.js are heavily used
Less focus on Kotlin/Java (secondary stack) in recent roles
